issue: No try/catch around async DB call — unhandled promise rejection crashes the process
suggestedFix: Wrap User.findOne() in try/catch and call next(error) in the catch block

issue: JWT secret hardcoded as string literal — anyone with repo access can forge tokens
suggestedFix: Replace with process.env.JWT_SECRET and add .env check on startup

issue: DELETE /users/:id route has no auth middleware — any unauthenticated caller can delete any user
suggestedFix: Add authMiddleware before the route handler: router.delete('/:id', authMiddleware, deleteUser)

issue: DB result not awaited — undefined returned silently instead of actual user data
Sendgrid API key hardcoded in source — credentials exposed in version control
No error handler on mongoose connection — silent failure if DB is unreachable at startup
Cross-file: this route skips authMiddleware but userService.js assumes req.user exists — will throw on line 34
suggestedFix: Add authMiddleware to this route or add null check in userService
